rulings.Case Title: MIRIAM PAVLOVA NALLEY ET AL VS. NICK VESTEL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants To 1) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, And Production Without Objection 2) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants First Set Of Special Interrogatories Without Objection 3) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories - General (Set One) Without Objection 4) Deem Admitted By Each Plaintiff Requests For Admissions (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday February 22, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT EUGENYA VESTEL, PETER VESTEL, NICK VESTEL Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants To 1) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, And Production Without Objection 2) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Defendants First Set Of Special Interrogatories Without Objection 3) Compel Responses By Each Plaintiff To Form Interrogatories - General (Set One) Without Objection 4) Deem Admitted By Each Plaintiff Requests For Admissions (Set One), And For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED. Admissions are deemed admitted. Complete verified responses without objections to be served within 20 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,600. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
